what_it_does: Enterprise CRM platform for sales, service, marketing, and workflow data.
access: Self-serve developer signup/trial, but production org scopes and connected-app approval are admin controlled.
surface: Very broad REST, SOAP, Bulk, Streaming, Metadata and Pub/Sub APIs.
mcp: No official product MCP found; community Salesforce MCP wrappers exist.
blocker: OAuth scope design, tenant setup, and object model breadth.

what_it_does: CRM and marketing automation platform for contacts, companies, deals and engagement data.
access: Self-serve developer account and private apps; marketplace/public apps require review.
surface: Broad documented REST APIs with CRM objects, owners, tickets, marketing and webhooks.
blocker: Map scopes carefully and handle per-portal object customization.

what_it_does: Sales CRM for deals, contacts, activities and pipelines.
access: Self-serve trial and developer sandbox; API token available from user settings.
surface: Broad REST API covering core CRM, activities, files, webhooks and marketplace apps.
blocker: Pagination/rate limits and OAuth for multi-tenant public apps.

what_it_does: Modern CRM with records, objects, lists, notes and workspace automation.
auth_methods: Bearer API token; OAuth2 for public apps
access: Self-serve workspace tokens; OAuth app distribution still needs app setup/review.
surface: REST API is solid for objects, records, lists, notes, tasks and webhooks.
blocker: API is young; some advanced workspace admin surfaces are limited.

what_it_does: Open-source CRM for companies, people, opportunities and tasks.
auth_methods: API key; bearer token; self-hosted auth
access: Self-serve because it is open-source and cloud signup is available.
surface: REST and GraphQL-style platform APIs are available, with direct self-host escape hatch.
blocker: Version drift between cloud and self-hosted deployments.

what_it_does: Work management and CRM-style app platform from Citrix for workspaces and items.
access: Self-serve developer docs, but app/workspace access depends on a Podio account/admin.
surface: Broad REST API for apps, items, files, tasks, comments and hooks.
blocker: Older API conventions and workspace-level permissions.

what_it_does: CRM platform for leads, contacts, deals, accounts and automation.
access: Self-serve Zoho API Console and free/trial CRM org; production depends on edition limits.
surface: Broad REST API with modules, bulk, COQL, metadata, notifications and SDKs.
blocker: Regional data centers and OAuth scope/module mapping.

what_it_does: Sales CRM focused on calling, email, leads and pipeline automation.
auth_methods: API key over Basic auth; OAuth2 for partners
access: Self-serve trial/account can create API keys; public app distribution needs partner setup.
surface: REST API covers leads, contacts, activities, calls, SMS, tasks and webhooks.
blocker: Basic auth token handling and activity volume/rate limits.

what_it_does: Google Workspace-native CRM for people, companies, opportunities and tasks.
auth_methods: API key plus user email headers
access: API keys are self-serve for account admins/users with permissions; plan limits apply.
surface: Documented REST API for core CRM resources and webhooks.
blocker: Header-based auth is simple but less OAuth-native for delegated agents.

what_it_does: Deal management CRM for private capital, banking and relationship intelligence.
access: Gated to DealCloud customers; API credentials are issued for tenant implementations.
surface: Documented REST API is broad for objects, records, users, notes and files.
blocker: Enterprise customer access and tenant-specific schema.

what_it_does: Customer support suite for tickets, users, help center and messaging.
auth_methods: OAuth2; API token; basic auth with token
access: Self-serve trial and developer docs; admins control token/OAuth enablement.
surface: Very broad REST APIs across Support, Guide, Talk, Sell, Sunshine and webhooks.
blocker: Many products and permission models; must bound tool surface.

what_it_does: Customer messaging, support inbox and help center platform.
access: Self-serve developer apps and test workspaces; app store review for public distribution.
surface: Broad REST API for contacts, conversations, tickets, articles, events and webhooks.
blocker: API versioning and conversation/ticket model differences.

what_it_does: Helpdesk platform for tickets, contacts, agents and support operations.

access: Self-serve Freshdesk trial/account; OAuth apps require Freshworks developer setup.
surface: Broad REST API for tickets, contacts, companies, agents, groups, SLAs and webhooks.
blocker: Product-family split across Freshdesk/Freshservice/Freshsales.

what_it_does: Shared inbox and customer operations platform for messages, contacts and channels.
access: Self-serve developer tokens for workspaces; OAuth app review for marketplace use.
surface: Broad REST API for messages, conversations, inboxes, contacts, teammates and rules.
blocker: Channel permissions and irreversible send/reply actions need guardrails.

what_it_does: B2B customer support platform for Slack, email, chat and account intelligence.

what_it_does: Helpdesk/live chat suite for tickets, chats, calls and knowledge base.
access: Self-serve trial can generate API keys; admin permissions required.
surface: Documented REST API for tickets, chats, contacts, agents and departments.

what_it_does: Developer-first customer support platform for issues, customers and events.

surface: GraphQL API and API reference for customers, threads, issues, events and webhooks.

what_it_does: Customer support mailbox and docs platform.
access: Self-serve developer apps and account trials; app marketplace review for public apps.
surface: REST APIs for mailboxes, conversations, customers, Docs and webhooks.

surface: REST API covers customers, tickets, messages, tags, integrations and ecommerce context.

surface: Documented REST APIs for conversations, customers, tasks and webhooks.

what_it_does: Communications platform for SMS, voice, WhatsApp, email and verification.

surface: Very broad REST APIs across messaging, voice, verify, conversations, SendGrid and more.
blocker: Messaging compliance, phone number registration and channel-specific rules.

surface: Documented REST API for chats, channels, bots, commands, messages and organization data.

what_it_does: Collaboration suite for messaging, docs, calendar and workplace apps.

access: Self-serve developer console; marketplace or enterprise deployment can require review/admin approval.
surface: Broad Open Platform APIs across messaging, docs, calendar, approvals and contacts.
blocker: Tenant/app token model and enterprise app approval.

what_it_does: Team chat app for channels, direct messages and collaboration.
auth_methods: Unknown / no verified public API auth
access: No verified public developer API documentation found; integrations are mostly app-level/Zapier-style.
surface: No public REST or GraphQL surface verified from official docs.
blocker: Public API docs/auth could not be verified; needs vendor confirmation.
